pages.title: AOS and GAS Sewage Treatment Plants
pages.summary: Proprietary AOS and GAS technologies. DENR DAO 2016-08, DAO 2021-19, Clean Water Act RA 9275 compliant. Compact footprint, low noise, low energy, fast deployment, and zero-sludge operation. As a non-chemical STP provider, we do not use chemicals in our treatment process. Full design-build-maintain + maintenance contracts. Target: hospitals, hotels, condos, morgues, developers, LGUs, industrial.
